data.title: Golden Suisse and Prof. Stiglitz host UHNWI Summit with 150 attendees at The Dolder Grand in Zurich.
data.description: On September 10th, Golden Suisse organized an upscale private wealth event at The Dolder Grand in Zurich, attended by over 150 distinguished Ultra-High-Net-Worth Individuals (UHNWIs) and family office leaders from 80 different locations.

data.title: Paligo appoints Rahul Yadav as new CEO to accelerate growth with focus on product innovation and AI.
data.description: Paligo, a prominent company in cloud-based Component Content Management Systems (CCMS), has appointed a new customer-centric technology leader to drive their market dominance and AI-driven expansion in the upcoming decade. The announcement was made in Stockholm on September 25, 2025. This news marks a significant move for Paligo as they aim to continue their success in the industry.

data.title: Rockwell Automation partners with Avvale and ESGeo for OT-generated sustainability reporting solution to automate data collection and improve sharing of sustainability metrics.
data.description: A recently introduced solution is aiding industrial firms in automating the gathering and organization of operational data to enhance the monitoring, transparency, and dissemination of sustainability indicators. This development was announced in Milan on September 25, 2025. Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), the leading global company in this sector, is spearheading this initiative.

data.title: Broadridge introduces ISO 20022 cash messaging for global post-trade clients, benefiting over 200 bank and broker clients.
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions, a leading company in the Fintech industry, unveiled on September 25, 2025, that it has successfully provided complete ISO 20022 cash processing services to its worldwide bank and broker/dealer clientele. This development ensures that clients, including those trading on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BR, are now equipped with advanced capabilities in cash processing.

data.title: V2 Cloud introduces V2CloudCare, a revolutionary cloud resilience solution. Leader in remote computing.
data.description: V2 Cloud, a top provider in fully managed cloud desktop, server, and application solutions for centralized, secure, and cost-effective remote computing, introduced V2CloudCare on September 25, 2025. This innovative service aims to transform cloud services by offering comprehensive support and solutions.

data.title: Raspberry Pi and NComputing join forces to introduce budget-friendly, secure Raspberry Pi 500+ keyboard computer to enterprises.
data.description: In a joint announcement made on September 25, 2025, in San Francisco and Cambridge, England, Raspberry Pi and NComputing revealed a significant partnership. The collaboration aims to introduce the Raspberry Pi 500+, an all-in-one keyboard computer, into the enterprise sector. By integrating this product with NComputing's LEAF OS, the partnership offers a comprehensive solution tailored for enterprise use. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to target the enterprise market with a cutting-edge product, merging the hardware expertise of Raspberry Pi with the software capabilities of NComputing.

data.title: 22 researchers, Citation Laureates 2025 announced by Clarivate Plc including first from mainland China.
data.description: London, September 25, 2025 - Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a renowned global provider of insightful intelligence, has revealed the Citation Laureates 2025 list, honoring 22 exceptional researchers. Notably, this year's list includes the first Citation Laureate hailing from mainland China.

data.title: "Viewpoint with Dennis Quaid partners with Highlands County, FL to showcase unique community preserving Florida's essence."
data.description: On September 25, 2025, it was announced that in a collaboration between "Viewpoint with Dennis Quaid" and Highlands County, FL, viewers will be able to witness a fresh perspective on Florida. The segment will showcase a distinctive community dedicated to conserving the essence of the Sunshine State. This partnership aims to shed light on the efforts of Highlands County and offer insights into their initiatives.

data.title: Tineco debuts FLOOR ONE S9 Artist at Fashion Week in Milan, highlighting design and performance in smart cleaning.
data.description: In Paris, Tineco, a top player in smart cleaning devices, introduced the FLOOR ONE S9 Artist in partnership with TikTok at a unique Fashion Week gathering in Milan's Diocesan Museum. This event showcased Tineco's talent in combining design and performance to elevate standard home maintenance. The S9 Artist transforms the typical floor washer into a stylish lifestyle piece, perfect for contemporary homes.

data.title: Xinjiang celebrates 70 years of progress and development. Unique region with diverse culture.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Beijing, a report released by China Daily highlighted the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the Xinjiang Uygur autonomous region. Over the past decades, Xinjiang has emerged as a region with distinctive geographical advantages and rich cultural heritage. As it commemorates this milestone, the region continues to showcase its potential and resilience, reflecting on its journey over the years.
